label: short
chain_of_thought:
Okay

Let me compute each term separately.

First, $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{7} \right\rfloor$:
$\frac{1000}{7} \approx 142.857$, so $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{7} \right\rfloor = 142$.

Second, $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{11} \right\rfloor$:
$\frac{1000}{11} \approx 90.909$, so $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{11} \right\rfloor = 90$.

Third, $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{13} \right\rfloor$:
$\frac{1000}{13} \approx 76.923$, so $\left\lfloor \frac{1000}{13} \right\rfloor = 76$.

Let me add them together:
$142 + 90 + 76 = 308$

So the answer is 308.
